ai_video_prompt_requests.prompt_text: slow push-in, subtle amber desk-lamp glow, controlled particles, no text
ai_video_prompt_requests.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, UI, chart, numbers, subtitles, fake interface, readable claims, low quality, jitter
ai_video_prompt_requests.proof_exclusion_policy: No proof, no readable text, no UI, no factual claims. Remotion owns captions and evidence overlays.
ai_video_prompt_requests.remotion_integration_plan: Use as a 2-second background video_plate under Remotion captions and proof-safe overlays.
ai_video_prompt_requests.handoff_instructions: Run comfyui-wan-video with the referenced input image and smoke-test settings first.

safety_review.notes: Pending lookdev review of the actual local output.

ai_video_candidates.notes: Local Wan2.2 output is a bounded concept-motion insert, not proof or final assembly.
